---
agent: plan
description: Create a detailed implementation plan with clarification.
---
Briefly analyze my feature request, then ask me 3 questions to clarify the requirements. Only then start the planning workflow.

Use the plan template at .github/plan-template.md to structure the output. Reference:
- AGENTS.md for project conventions
- prompts/agent-flows.md for decision trees
- ROADMAP.md for project priorities
